items.title: What to Expect From Honeywell International's Next Quarterly Earnings Report
items.description: Honeywell International will release its third-quarter earnings later this month, and analysts anticipate a marginal profit dip.

items.title: ‘Our chapters will work for any enterprise’: Honeywell’s AI chiefs share the strategies that helped the firm mature its AI efforts
items.description: The company’s “six-chapter framework” includes sections for sales effectiveness and for everyday workflows, keeping the focus on use cases that will truly move the needle.

items.title: CoreWeave to acquire Monolith AI to expand AI cloud platform
items.description: Monolith's simulation-driven and ML technologies will be paired with CoreWeave's AI cloud infrastructure to create a platform for industrial and manufacturing sectors.
